stemHtml:
For pre-flight planning purposes, what is the minimum Take-off Fuel required for the Commercial Air Transport flight in a Jet aircraft aeroplane, given the following information? A suitable airport has been nominated as the En-Route alternate aerodrome.

Route Distance: 2548 NM
Air Distance: 2725 NM
Estimated TAS: 431 kt
Estimated flight time to the alternate: 34 minutes
Average wind component: 28 kt headwind
Average fuel flow: 3048 kg/h
Final reserve: 1351 kg
Extra Fuel: 0 kg
Discretionary Fuel: 0 kg
